conversation_starters.title: Fire chiefs warn against trespassing in missile silos – unless you're prepared to pay $5K fee
conversation_starters.summary: Fire chiefs warning about people entering missile silos — novel, fun local oddity, work-safe. You could open with: 'Did you hear people are sneaking into old missile silos out here — apparently there's a $5K rescue fee now?'

conversation_starters.title: Colorado bride with MS surprises wedding guests by walking down aisle
conversation_starters.summary: Colorado bride with MS walks down the aisle — light, uplifting local human interest that sparks a natural exchange. You could open with: 'Did you catch that Colorado bride with MS who surprised everyone by walking down the aisle?'

conversation_starters.title: 'It is extremely hot' | Construction workers tough out the July heat to install AC in some DPS schools
conversation_starters.summary: Crews installing AC in DPS schools during July heat — this is relief/mitigation framing, so conversation starter, not are-you-ok. You could open with: 'Did you see they're finally putting AC in some DPS schools during this heat?'

you_should_know.summary: Boulder PD closing complaints before independent review — police-accountability institutional story landing locally. Unsafe opener; context.
